sections.paragraph:
Original: אפרסי

Transliteration: 'ăphâresay

Phonetic: af-aw-re-sah'ee

BDB Definition:

Apharsite = "causers of division (?)"
  1. (CLBL) an unknown office
  2. (BDB) secretaries
  3. (TWOT) perhaps a title of an official

Origin: of foreign origin (only in the plural)

TWOT entry: 2598

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
